title: lithospermum corsonianum
intro: Lithospermum corsonianum, also known as the Rocky Mountain gromwell, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lithospermum corsonianum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Lithospermum corsonianum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
